rulings.Case Title: BOBBY SISK ET AL VS. EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 19, 2016, 2016, Line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANTS EL BETHEL ARMS, INC., EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC.'S And Motion To Disqualify Counsel. GRANTED. Commins & Knudsen is disqualified from representing a client, taking a position adverse to El Behtel Arms, in or out of Court. Michal Mazzocone is also disqualified. Mr. Knudsen maintains that no confidential information was obtained (contrary to Mr. Harrison's declaration) or shared. Mr. Mazzocone does not affirmatively state that no confidential information was obtained from Mr. Knudsen. Mr. Mazzocone's declaration re: gaining confidential information is made in the context of lack of communication directly with El Bethel Arms or its current counsel, Spellberg. (Declaration, paragraph 5). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief Under Ccp 473
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 19, 2016, 2016, Line 3. PLAINTIFF POODLES, INC.'S Motion For Relief Under CCP 473. DENIED. Plaintiff moves for relief of "vacating the judgment in Poodles I and allowing Plaintiff Poodles, Inc. to file an amended complaint in Poodles I, and/or to consolidate the two cases so that Plaintiff Poodles, Inc. can proceed with its claims on the merits." (Motion 1:13-15). Plaintiff provides no authority for the proposition that there are valid grounds to disturb a judgment in Poodles I, or that an action in which a judgment has been entered may be consolidated with another action. Plaintiff had its day in Court, and had a full opportunity to present its claims against the Defendant. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL VS. CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 19, 2016, 2016, Line 4. PLAINTIFFS EL BETHEL ARMS, INC., EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC.'S Motion To Disqualify Counsel. GRANTED. Commins & Knudsen is disqualified from representing a client, taking a position adverse to El Bethel Arms, in or out of Court. Michal Mazzocone is also disqualified. Mr. Knudsen maintains that no confidential information was obtained (contrary to Mr. Harrison's declaration) or shared. Mr. Mazzocone does not affirmatively state that no confidential information was obtained from Mr. Knudsen. Mr. Mazzocone's declaration re: gaining confidential information is made in the context of lack of communication directly with El Bethel Arms or its current counsel, Spellberg. (Mazzocone Declaration, paragraph 5). =(501/REQ)
